zh.lifeSummary: 當Walter de Lindsay Lord of Lamberton於大約1172年出生在蘇格蘭哈丁頓史爾阿拉迪時，他的父親William de Lindsay26歲，母親Eleanor Limesi18歲。他去世於1221年在英國蘇格蘭貝維其可爾藍波頓享年50歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭貝維其可爾藍波頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Walter de Lindsay Lord of Lamberton于大约1172年出生在苏格兰哈丁頓史爾阿拉迪时，他的父亲William de Lindsay26岁，母亲Eleanor Limesi18岁。他去世于1221年在英国苏格兰貝維其可爾藍波頓享年50岁，埋葬在苏格兰貝維其可爾藍波頓。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Lindsay
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from Lindsey in Lincolnshire, England. This is first found in the form Lindissi, apparently a derivative of the British name of Lincoln . To this was later added the Old English element ēg ‘island’, since the place was virtually cut off by the surrounding fenland. The surname was taken to Scotland at an early date and is the name of an important and powerful Scottish family.
Irish: adopted as an equivalent ofvarious Gaelic names (see   Lindsey  ).

variants.name: Linzy
meanings: Altered form of Scottish, Irish, or English   Lindsay   or   Lindsey  . Compare   Lenzy  .

variants.name: Linzey
meanings: English: variant of   Lindsay   or   Lindsey  .

variants.name: Lindsey
meanings: Irish: shortened and Anglicized form of various Gaelic surnames, as for example Ó Loingsigh (see Lynch 1), Mac Giolla Fhionntóg (see McClintock ), and Ó Fhloinn (see Flynn and Lynn ).

variants.name: Lincoln
meanings: English: habitational name from the city of Lincoln, so named from an original British name Lindo- ‘lake’ + Latin colonia ‘settlement, colony’. The place was an important administrative center during the Roman occupation of Britain and in the Middle Ages it was a center for the manufacture of cloth, including the famous ‘Lincoln green’.
African American: adoption of the surname in 1 above, in honor of Abraham Lincoln, the 16th president of the US, who abolished slavery.
History: Abraham Lincoln (1809–65), 16th president of the US, was the son of an illiterate laborer, descended from Samuel Lincoln, who had emigrated from England to MA in 1637.

variants.name: Linsey
meanings: Scottish, Irish, or English: variant of   Lindsay   or   Lindsey  .
Americanized form of German Linse or Swiss German Linsi, see Lins .

nameMeanings.name: Walter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from wald ‘rule’ + heri, hari ‘army’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, superseding the native Old English form, Wealdhere. It was a very popular name in medieval England, normally pronounced ‘Water’.

variants.name: Walther
meanings: from wald ‘rule’ + heri ‘army’; name of the famous medieval minnesinger Walther von der Vogelweide ( c.1170– c.1230 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Walter de Lindsay Lord of Lamberton was born about 1172, in Aberlady, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, his father, William de Lindsay, was 26 and his mother, Eleanor Limesi, was 18. He died in 1221, in Lamberton, Berwickshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 50, and was buried in Lamberton, Berwickshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Walter de Lindsay Lord of Lamberton est né environ 1172, à Aberlady, Haddingtonshire, Écosse, son père, William de Lindsay, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Eleanor Limesi, avait 18 ans. Il est décédé en 1221, à Lamberton, Berwickshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 50 ans, et a été enterré à Lamberton, Berwickshire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Walter de Lindsay Lord of Lamberton um 1172 in Aberlady, Haddingtonshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater William de Lindsay 26 und seine Mutter Eleanor Limesi 18. Er starb 1221 im Alter von 50 Jahren in Lamberton, Berwickshire, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Lamberton, Berwickshire, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Walter de Lindsay Lord of Lamberton è nato il circa 1172 nel Aberlady, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, il suo padre, William de Lindsay, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Eleanor Limesi, aveva 18 anni. Morì nel 1221, nel Lamberton, Berwickshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 50 anni, e fu sepolto a Lamberton, Berwickshire, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Walter de Lindsay Lord of Lambertonが約1172年にスコットランドハッドイントンシュアイアアバーラディで生まれた時，父William de Lindsayは26歳，母Eleanor Limesiは18歳であった。彼は1221年にイギリススコットランドバーウィクシュアイアランバートンで50歳で死去し，スコットランドバーウィクシュアイアランバートンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Walter de Lindsay Lord of Lamberton(이)가 대략 1172년 스컷랜드 하딩토실르 압를레이디에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William de Lindsay(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Eleanor Limesi(은)는 18세였다. 그는 1221년 영국 스코틀랜드 버윅실르 램르턴에서 50세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 버윅실르 램르턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Walter de Lindsay Lord of Lamberton nasceu aproximadamente 1172, em Aberlady, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, seu pai, William de Lindsay, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Eleanor Limesi, tinha 18 anos. Ele faleceu em 1221, em Lamberton, Berwickshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 50 anos, e foi sepultado em Lamberton, Berwickshire, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Walter de Lindsay Lord of Lamberton родился около 1172 г. в местности абирледи, хаддингтоншир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени William de Lindsay было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Eleanor Limesi, 18. Он умер в 1221 г. в местности лэмбиртон, бирвиккшир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 50 лет и был похоронен в местности лэмбиртон, бирвиккшир, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Walter de Lindsay Lord of Lamberton nació aproximadamente 1172, en Aberlady, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, su papá, William de Lindsay, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Eleanor Limesi, tenía 18 años. Murió en 1221, en Lamberton, Berwickshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 50 años, y fue sepultado en Lamberton, Berwickshire, Scotland.
